newClaims.quote: UAB requires all international visiting medical students to have medical health insurance. You may purchase UAB Student Health Insurance or provide your own. Non-UAB health insurance must be approved by UAB Student Health before arrival.
newClaims.claimText: Medical health insurance required; can purchase UAB Student Health Insurance or provide own (approved by UAB Student Health).
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Health insurance is a pre-arrival eligibility requirement for the IVMS visiting student program.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured malpractice but missed the separate Health Insurance Coverage subsection.

newClaims.quote: You must provide a copy of your current transcript written in English or accompanied by an English translation.
newClaims.claimText: Current transcript must be in English or accompanied by English translation.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility/document requirement for the visiting student application.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 listed documents generally but missed the explicit English-language transcript requirement.

newClaims.quote: We will only accept TOEFL scores that have been taken within a two (2) year period from the date that the application was submitted.
newClaims.claimText: TOEFL scores must have been taken within 2 years of application submission.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: TOEFL score validity rule — eligibility detail beyond the score thresholds A1 captured.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured TOEFL thresholds and waivers but missed the 2-year validity window.

newClaims.quote: Payment can be made by a major credit card or wire transfer.
newClaims.claimText: Payment accepted by major credit card or wire transfer.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Cost logistics — payment method detail for IVMS fees.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured fee amounts but omitted the payment-method sentence.

newClaims.quote: For cancellation of your elective more than 90 calendar days before the start date of the elective, only half of your course elective fee will be refunded, minus any administrative or financial processing fees.
newClaims.claimText: Cancellation >90 days before start: 50% refund minus fees; <90 days: no refund.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Refund/cancellation policy for visiting student program.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 noted no scholarships but didn't capture the cancellation/refund tiers.

newClaims.quote: The IVMS program has a strict policy for arriving and departing. Arrival is the Sunday before electives and departure is the Saturday at the end of the elective, before 11am.
newClaims.claimText: Strict arrival/departure: arrive Sunday before elective; depart Saturday at end before 11am.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Logistics policy specific to the IVMS visiting student program.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 didn't capture the arrival/departure logistics paragraph.

newClaims.quote: Student Health Form Acknowledging that you must receive medical clearance prior to training. More details/instructions about how to upload documentation will be sent in pre-matriculation email sent 8 weeks prior to start date.
newClaims.claimText: Medical clearance required prior to training; instructions sent in pre-matriculation email 8 weeks prior.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Health clearance / immunization-style requirement for IVMS participation.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1's document list mentioned 'Health Compliance Documentation' but didn't extract the explicit medical-clearance requirement and 8-week pre-matric window.

newClaims.quote: Elective preferences for 1 or 2 rotations based on availability in catalogue
newClaims.claimText: Applicants submit preferences for 1 or 2 rotations based on catalogue availability.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Application pathway step — rotation preference selection.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 grouped documents but didn't note the 1-2 rotation preference selection step.
